name: herumhai-backend
description: HerumHai Backend — optimized for HidenCloud 3GB RAM

scripts.db:setup: node -e "import('pg').then(async pg => { const pool = new pg.Pool({ connectionString: process.env.DATABASE_URL }); const fs = await import('fs'); await pool.query(fs.readFileSync('schema.sql', 'utf-8')); console.log('Schema created'); await pool.end(); })"
